LLM04.title: Data and Model Poisoning

LLM04.note: Provenance tracking (MLflow/DVC/CycloneDX ML-BOM) and anomaly detection on training data are out of code-scan scope. /agentic-security:posture-management --aibom generates the ML-BOM artifact.

LLM09.title: Misinformation
LLM09.note: Not patchable by a static scan. Document your RAG grounding strategy, fact-check pipeline, and output-labelling policy in SECURITY.md. Consider promptfoo evaluations: /agentic-security:llm-eval to scaffold a CI-bound test suite.
